# Phase 8: Scroll Infrastructure - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-03-28
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Mode:** Auto-generated (infrastructure phase — ROADMAP spec is sufficient)

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Fix scroll so it actually works — keyboard, mouse, auto-follow, and user override. This phase covers the scroll viewport repaint mechanism, keyboard/mouse input handling, follow mode logic, and scroll state management. It does NOT cover streaming content rendering (Phase 9) or UX polish (Phase 11).

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

### Claude's Discretion
All implementation choices are at Claude's discretion — infrastructure phase with well-defined spec. Use ROADMAP phase goal, success criteria, and codebase conventions to guide decisions.

</decisions>
